message:
chore(artifacts): re-run verification evidence for sections 10.4, 10.5, 10.12, 10.14, 10.15, 13, replacement_gap, and migration cohort

All beads still PASS. Timestamps updated from 2026-03-21 to
2026-03-24/25 reflecting fresh verification runs. Two file-size
witnesses updated to reflect recent source growth:
- bd-2aj: ecosystem_registry.rs 33714 -> 36254 bytes
- bd-1vm: quarantine.rs 58201 -> 66475 bytes

Migration cohort validation log and summary also re-run with all
10 MCV checks still PASS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
